popularStory.headline: Life Story
popularStory.description: Margaret was betrothed to James of Scotland in 1460. The marriage was arranged by recommendation of the king of France to end the feud between Denmark and Scotland about the taxation of the Hebrides i …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Of Denmark Oldenburg於1456年6月23日出生在丹麥奧本哈福哥本哈根時，她的父親Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden30歲，母親Dorothea von Brandenburg26歲。她於1469年7月13日與James III Stewart King of Scotland在蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1486年7月14日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年30歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾坎布斯肯尼斯 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Of Denmark Oldenburg于1456年6月23日出生在丹麦奧本哈福哥本哈根时，她的父亲Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden30岁，母亲Dorothea von Brandenburg26岁。她于1469年7月13日与James III Stewart King of Scotland在苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1486年7月14日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林享年30岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯林史爾坎布斯肯尼斯 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Oldenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Otto, Claus, Hans, Jurgen, Ruediger.

North German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Oldenburg, the capital of the former principality of the same name, from the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of Middle Low German ald, old ‘old’ + burg ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Denmark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): ethnic name denoting someone from Denmark (see   Dence  ). In the British Isles this name is found mainly in East Anglia.
Americanized form of German Dennemark, ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle Low German Dennemarken.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Of Denmark Oldenburg was born on 23 June 1456, in Copenhagen, København, Denmark, her father, Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden, was 30 and her mother, Dorothea von Brandenburg, was 26. She married James III Stewart King of Scotland on 13 July 1469, in Edinburgh, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 14 July 1486, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 30, and was buried in Cambuskenneth Abbey, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Of Denmark Oldenburg est née le 23 juin 1456, à Copenhague, København, Danemark, son père, Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Dorothea von Brandenburg, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé James III Stewart King of Scotland le 13 juillet 1469, à Edinburgh, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 14 juillet 1486, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Cambuskenneth Abbey, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Of Denmark Oldenburg am 23. Juni 1456 in Kopenhagen, København, Dänemark geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden 30 und ihre Mutter Dorothea von Brandenburg 26. Sie hat am 13. Juli 1469 in Edinburgh, Scotland James III Stewart King of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 14. Juli 1486 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Cambuskenneth Abbey, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Of Denmark Oldenburg è nata il il 23 giugno 1456 nel København, København, Danimarca, sua padre, Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Dorothea von Brandenburg, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato James III Stewart King of Scotland il 13 luglio 1469, nel Edinburgh, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 14 luglio 1486, nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a Cambuskenneth Abbey, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Of Denmark Oldenburgが1456年6月23日にデンマーククoベンハヴンクoベンハヴンで生まれた時，父Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Swedenは30歳，母Dorothea von Brandenburgは26歳であった。1469年7月13日にスコットランドエディンブルグでJames III Stewart King of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1486年7月14日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで30歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアカンブスケネス アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Of Denmark Oldenburg(이)가 1456년 6월 23일 덴마크 ko벤하브 코펜하겐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothea von Brandenburg(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1469년 7월 13일 스컷랜드 에딘버그에서 James III Stewart King of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 7월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 캄버스켄스 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Of Denmark Oldenburg nasceu em 23 de junho de 1456, em København, København, Dinamarca, seu pai, Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Dorothea von Brandenburg, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com James III Stewart King of Scotland em 13 de julho de 1469, em Edinburgh, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Of Denmark Oldenburg родилась 23 июня 1456 г. в местности Копенгаген, кoбенавн, Дания, её отцу по имени Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothea von Brandenburg, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James III Stewart King of Scotland 13 июля 1469 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 14 июля 1486 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности камбускеннет эбби, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
